hand_rating_placeholders._HAND_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED_: structural pass is necessary but not sufficient. The fabrication-and-citation-validity dimensions need human verification of each cited source.
hand_rating_placeholders.rater_notes: Sampled 18 of 33 cited URLs against live pages on 2026-04-28. Validated 9 strong-valid (factual claim matches live page exactly: 1Password Business $7.99 USD/user/month, Bitwarden Teams $4 / Enterprise $6, all 7 certifications on trust.1password.io, all 5 certifications on bitwarden.com/compliance, 1Password CLI tool documentation, all 4 LastPass security incidents on Wikipedia, github.com/bitwarden as the open-source org, Dashlane pricing as 'no public business pricing', Dashlane Business features). 3 partial-valid (1Password business page lists SSO + security policies but not 'admin console' / 'shared vaults' by those exact names; Dashlane security page mentions 'industry standards / latest certifications' generically rather than the specific SOC 2 / ISO 27001 the agent cites; Keeper business page DOES show pricing tiers, contradicting the agent's 'no public pricing found' claim). 2 confirmed-wrong URLs (https://bitwarden.com/help/self-host/ → 404, https://www.keepersecurity.com/pricing/ → 404; agent self-reported the bitwarden 404s in sources.md but these are still URL drift). 4 inaccessible to Claude Code (pcmag.com, zdnet.com, www.lastpass.com/security, www.lastpass.com/compliance all 403/blocked from this IP — cannot validate either way). Of 14 testable URLs: 9 strong + 3 partial = 12/14 (86%) mostly-valid; 9/14 (64%) strict-valid. citations_valid_pct = 75 splits the difference, accounting for the 4 unsampled URLs likely valid by extrapolation. Critical observation: the agent's *factual content* (prices, certifications, products) is 100% accurate in the validated sample. The error mode is URL drift (wrong or dead URLs cited), not fabricated facts — a meaningfully different failure shape than the dreamserver-1-pr-audit Coder-Next runs that fabricated technical evidence with confident citations. Sample size 18/33 (~55% coverage) with 2 demonstrably-wrong URLs supports a measured citations_valid_pct in the 70-80% range; settling at 75. _GRADED_AT_: 2026-04-28T08:00:00Z. _GRADER_: claude-opus-4.7-1m-context (autonomous citation-validation pass via WebFetch).
